dbEquipBonuses.name: Devastating Precision
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 20% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your enemy suffers +4% Critical Severity, while you gain +8% Critical Severity for 8 seconds (10 second cooldown).
